rural_site_scaling: Increased where adjacent systems exist or percolation tests borderline (upper/lower 20% of permitted limits)
sightline_y: Local Roads 90 m; Regional Roads 150 m; National Roads 230 m (sight distances from rural entrances)
wastewater_standard: Individual treatment system (septic tank & percolation area or equivalent); EPA wastewater treatment manual; maintenance agreement min 5 years
residential_density_dph: DMS16.17: 30 units/ha Longford town centre; DMS16.18: 12 units/ha other towns/settlements; DMS16.19 rural villages take cognisance of prevailing scale
plot_ratio: Town Centre/Brownfield 1.0-2.0; Inner Suburban 0.5-1.0; Outer Suburban 0.35-0.5 (DMS16.24)
site_coverage_pct: Residential 50%; Retail 60%; Industrial & Commercial 75%; Town Centre 80%; generally not to exceed 80%
separation_distance_m: 22 m between directly opposing rear windows at first floor (DMS16.32); 35 m for overlooking living-room windows/balconies at upper floors (DMS16.33)
private_open_space: 1 bed 48 m²; 2 bed 55 m²; 3 bed 60 m²; 4+ bed 75 m² (DMS16.25)
public_open_space_pct: Greenfield minimum 15% of total site area (relaxation possible where density <8 dwellings/ha)
car_parking_dwelling: Apartments/Flats 2 per dwelling (houses not separately listed)
building_height: Greater-than-prevailing heights need strong urban design rationale (Design Statement); determined by prevailing height/streetscape/protected structures/ACAs
trigger_AA: Required for all plans/projects under Habitats Directive Art 6(3); Natura Impact Statement (Stage 2) where AA Screening concludes AA required (§16.2.3)
trigger_EIA: Schedule 5 of PD Regs 2001 lists mandatory thresholds for EIAR; sub-threshold discretionary EIAR by notice (§16.2.4)
trigger_FRA: Flood Risk Assessment may be required (§16.2.5)
trigger_EcIA: Ecological / Biodiversity Assessment may be required (§16.2.5)
trigger_VIA: Landscape Appraisal and Visual Assessment may be required (§16.2.5)
trigger_TTA: Traffic and Transport Assessment (TTA) & Road Safety Audits may be required (§16.2.5)
notes: DMS16.x = numbered standards. Min house floor areas DMS16.43 (1 bed 55 m² to 4+ bed 110 m²). Apartment standards DMS16.58. Infrastructure Assessments particularly for developments over 50 units. Ground-floor window not less than 1 m from boundary it faces (DMS16.35). All one-off housing to install min 1 EV home charge point (A5.2). No trees within 7 m of public light column.
